synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-22956 Oracle Linux 10 .NET 10.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-22956
description:
[10.0.101-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.101-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.101 and Runtime 10.0.1
- Resolves: RHEL-130941
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-22956

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-22956.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-10.0-10.0.1-1.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-10.0-10.0.1-1.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
